name: Share Modal
description: Invite collaborators and manage document sharing. Includes email invite, shareable link, and current collaborators management.

invite.description: Email invite form with role selector

link.description: Shareable link management with copy-to-clipboard URL, permission settings, and expiration controls

members.description: Current collaborators list with role management

slots.members-list: List of current collaborators with roles

slots.invite-form: Email input with role selector and autocomplete

visual_brief: Modal dialog with tabs for Invite, Link, and Members. The Invite tab shows an email input with autocomplete, a role dropdown (Viewer, Editor, Admin), and a Send button. The Link tab has a toggle to enable/disable shareable link, the link URL in a copy-able input, and permission settings (view/edit, expiration). The Members tab lists current collaborators as rows with avatar, name, email, role dropdown, and a remove button. Pending invitations show an 'Invited' badge with a resend option. The modal header shows the document or resource name being shared.

responsive.mobile: Modal takes near-full screen. Tabs render as a top bar. Email input full-width. Member list scrolls vertically. Role dropdowns use native selects.
responsive.tablet: Centered modal at 520px width. Standard tab navigation. Member list comfortable.
responsive.desktop: Centered modal at 560px width. Full tab layout. Member management with inline role selectors.
